ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing For Filing Of A Petition For Final Distribution, Or A Petition For Approval Of Report On Status Of Administration
Off Calendar Aug-04-2025 Off Calendar

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED
Off Calendar Jul-29-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Michele Abernathy appeared by zoom for Malachi Pollard (petitioner).

The court noted that there were questions as to whether or not the thank you card is a will, and stated that it thinks it is. No one appeared to object. There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Letters of Administration with Will Annexed. The undated will is admitted to probate. Malachi Richlen Pollard is appointed as the Administrator of the estate with will annexed with limited authority. Bond is set at $120,000.00. Order for the same signed in open court. A status hearing for filing of a petition for final distribution, or a petition for approval of report on status of administration is set for August 4, 2025, at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. If either petition is filed two weeks prior, the status hearing will go off calendar. Amy Harrington is appointed probate referee.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Jaime. Not reported.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED
Off Calendar Jul-01-2024 Continued To Jul-29-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
